title: India Post GDS Third Result / Merit List 2026 for 28635 Post
short_information: Department of Post India Post has relased Gramin Dak Sevaks GDS 2026 Notification. Those candidates who are interested in this India Post GDS Recruitment 2026 Exam can Apply Online 31/01/2026 to 14/02/2026. Read the notification for India Post GDS Vacancy 2026, eligibility, Subject Details information, Document Required, age limit, How to Apply and all other information. Department of Post (India Post) India Post Gramin Dak Sevaks GDS Recruitment 2026 India Post GDS 2026 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / OBC : 100/- SC / ST / PH : 0/- (Nil) All Category Female : 0/- (Exempted) Pay the Exam Fee Through India Post E Challan Submit at Nearest Head Post Office / GPO India Post GDS Recruitment 2026 :
eligibility: Gramin Dak Sewak GDS 2026 28635 Class 10 High School with Mathematics and English as a Subject. Know the Local Language. More Details Read the Notification. India Post GDS 2026 Notification : State Wise

tables.table_name: India Post GDS Recruitment 2026 : Age Limit as on 14/02/2026 Minimum Age : 18 Years. Maximum Age : 40 Years. Age Relaxation Extra as per India Post GDS Recruitment Rules Schedule 2026.

text_sections.section: How to Fill India Post GDS Online Form 2026
text_sections.content: India Post GDS Delhi Are Released Gramin Dak Sewak GDS All India Recruitment in Various Recruitment 2025. Candidate Can Apply Between Available Soon. | Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in India Post GDS Jobs Recruitment 2026. | Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. | Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Admission Entrance Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. | Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. | Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
